title: CLASP retrieval.ext
description: CLASP-conformant MCP server capability declaration, populated into the ext field of a CoMP Retrieval object. See clause 'Extension: retrieval.ext' of CLASP-0.1.

exact_text_mode.description: 0=No, 1=Yes. Whether the endpoint supports deterministic exact-text retrieval. REQUIRED for endpoints serving stamped or submitted deliverables.

citation_envelope.description: URI of the citation envelope schema this endpoint emits. For v0.1 this MUST be https://clasp.example/schemas/citation-envelope-0.1.json or a locally-hosted equivalent.

max_artifact_bytes.description: Maximum artifact size accepted by compliance_check. REQUIRED if tool value 5 (compliance_check) is listed in tools.

revocation_uri.description: Optional URI at which the Content Owner publishes a revocation list.

allOf.description: If compliance_check (5) is listed in tools, max_artifact_bytes is required.
